skills.name: Protective Polish
skills.description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.

levels.description: Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
While active, increases affinity by 60%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.

skills.name: Tool Specialist
skills.description: Reduces the recharge time for specialized tools.

skills.name: Dragon Resistance
skills.description: Increases dragon resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

skills.name: Power Prolonger
skills.description: Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer.

levels.description: Slightly increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Greatly increases the duration weapons are powered up.

skills.name: Dragon Attack
skills.description: Increases dragon element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)
